---
title: "Sediment Trace Element Map"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
<style>
.map-container { height: 500px; width: 100%; }
#map            { height: 100%; width: 100%; border-radius: 6px; }

/* Legend */
.legend {
  background: white;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  line-height: 1.6;
  font-size: 13px;
}
.legend-title { font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.legend-bar {
  width: 160px; height: 12px;
  background: linear-gradient(to right, #ffffb2, #fecc5c, #fd8d3c, #f03b20, #bd0026);
  border-radius: 2px;
  margin: 4px 0;
}
.legend-labels {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #555;
}

/* Home button */
.leaflet-home-button {
  background: white;
  border: 2px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  border-radius: 4px;
  width: 26px; height: 26px;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 22px;
  text-align: center;
  display: block;
  color: #444;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.leaflet-home-button:hover { background: #f4f4f4; }
</style>
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false

db = {
  const StratumSQLite = await window._stratumSQLite;
  return StratumSQLite.open(window._dbPath, {
    sqlJsPath: window._sqljsBase,
    cacheKey:  "pilot-mareano@v0.1.4",
  });
}

L = require("https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js")

home_lat = 68
home_lng = 15
home_zoom = 4

elements = [
  { label: "Cobalt (Co)",      value: "Co" },
  { label: "Copper (Cu)",      value: "Cu" },
  { label: "Manganese (Mn)",   value: "Mn" },
  { label: "Molybdenum (Mo)",  value: "Mo" },
  { label: "Selenium (Se)",    value: "Se" },
  { label: "Zinc (Zn)",        value: "Zn" }
]
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
mutable clicked_point = null
```

```{ojs}
//| panel: sidebar

viewof selected_element = Inputs.select(elements, {
  label: "Element:",
  format: d => d.label,
  value: elements[0]
})

year_range_result = db.query(`
  SELECT MIN(c1.year) AS min_year, MAX(c1.year) AS max_year
  FROM sediment s
  JOIN cruise c1 ON c1.cruise_id = s.cruise_id
  JOIN parameter p ON p.parameter = s.parameter
  WHERE p.symbol = '${selected_element.value}'
`)

min_year = year_range_result[0].min_year ?? 2003
max_year = year_range_result[0].max_year ?? 2022

viewof year_start = Inputs.range(
  [min_year, max_year],
  { label: "Year from:", step: 1, value: min_year }
)

viewof year_end = Inputs.range(
  [min_year, max_year],
  { label: "Year to:", step: 1, value: max_year }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| panel: fill

// --- Value range query (for legend and colour scale) ---
value_range_result = db.query(`
  SELECT symbol AS param,
         MIN(avg_value) AS min_avg_value,
         MAX(avg_value) AS max_avg_value
  FROM (SELECT p.symbol,
               AVG(s.value) AS avg_value
        FROM sediment s
                 JOIN cruise c1 ON c1.cruise_id = s.cruise_id
                 JOIN core c2 ON c2.cruise_id = s.cruise_id and c2.core_id = s.core_id
                 JOIN sample s1
                      ON s1.sample_id = s.sample_id and s1.cruise_id = s.cruise_id and s1.core_id = s.core_id
                 JOIN parameter p ON p.parameter = s.parameter
        WHERE p.symbol = '${selected_element.value}'
          AND c1.year BETWEEN ${year_start} AND ${year_end}
        GROUP BY p.symbol, c2.dde, c2.ddn) t
  GROUP BY symbol
`)

value_min = value_range_result[0]?.min_avg_value ?? 0
value_max = value_range_result[0]?.max_avg_value ?? 1

// --- Map data query ---
map_data = db.query(`
  SELECT c2.dde AS longitude,
         c2.ddn AS latitude,
         AVG(s.value) AS avg_value
  FROM sediment s
           JOIN cruise c1 ON c1.cruise_id = s.cruise_id
           JOIN core c2 ON c2.cruise_id = s.cruise_id and c2.core_id = s.core_id
           JOIN sample s1
                ON s1.sample_id = s.sample_id and s1.cruise_id = s.cruise_id and s1.core_id = s.core_id
           JOIN parameter p ON p.parameter = s.parameter
  WHERE p.symbol = '${selected_element.value}'
    AND c1.year BETWEEN ${year_start} AND ${year_end}
  GROUP BY p.symbol, c2.dde, c2.ddn
`)

// --- Colour scale using element+year-specific range ---
colorScale = d3.scaleSequential()
  .domain([value_min, value_max])
  .interpolator(d3.interpolateYlOrRd)

function markerColor(v) {
  return v == null ? "#aaa" : colorScale(v)
}

function fmtVal(v) {
  return v == null ? "N/A" : v.toFixed(0) + " mg/kg"
}

// --- Render / update map ---
{
  const container = html`<div class="map-container"><div id="map"></div></div>`
  yield container

  if (!container._map) {
    const map = L.map(container.querySelector("#map"), { zoomControl: true })
      .setView([home_lat, home_lng], home_zoom)

    L.tileLayer("https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png", {
      attribution: "© OpenStreetMap contributors"
    }).addTo(map)

    // --- Home button (added below the zoom control) ---
    const HomeControl = L.Control.extend({
      options: { position: "topleft" },
      onAdd(map) {
        const btn = L.DomUtil.create("a", "leaflet-home-button")
        btn.innerHTML = "⌂"
        btn.title = "Reset view"
        L.DomEvent.on(btn, "click", (e) => {
          L.DomEvent.stopPropagation(e)
          map.setView([home_lat, home_lng], home_zoom)
        })
        return btn
      }
    })
    new HomeControl().addTo(map)

    // --- Legend ---
    const LegendControl = L.Control.extend({
      options: { position: "bottomright" },
      onAdd() {
        const div = L.DomUtil.create("div", "legend")
        div.id = "map-legend"
        return div
      }
    })
    new LegendControl().addTo(map)

    container._map     = map
    container._markers = L.layerGroup().addTo(map)
  }

  const { _map: map, _markers: markers } = container

  // Update legend content whenever element or year range changes
  const legendEl = map.getContainer().querySelector("#map-legend")
  if (legendEl) {
    legendEl.innerHTML = `
      <div class="legend-title">${selected_element.label}</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;color:#555">Avg (µg/kg) · ${year_start}–${year_end}</div>
      <div class="legend-bar"></div>
      <div class="legend-labels">
        <span>${fmtVal(value_min)}</span> &nbsp;
        <span>${fmtVal((value_min + value_max) / 2)}</span> &nbsp;
        <span>${fmtVal(value_max)}</span>
      </div>
    `
  }

  markers.clearLayers()
  mutable clicked_point = null

  for (const d of map_data) {
    if (d.avg_value == null) continue
    const circle = L.circleMarker([d.latitude, d.longitude], {
      radius:      7,
      fillColor:   markerColor(d.avg_value),
      color:       "#333",
      weight:      0.8,
      opacity:     1,
      fillOpacity: 0.85
    })
    circle.bindTooltip(
      `<b>${selected_element.label}</b><br>
       Avg: ${fmtVal(d.avg_value)}<br>
       (${year_start}–${year_end})`,
      { sticky: true }
    )
    circle.on("click", () => {
      mutable clicked_point = { lon: d.longitude, lat: d.latitude }
    })
    markers.addLayer(circle)
  }
}

map_data.length === 0
  ? md`*No data found for this selection.*`
  : md`**${selected_element.label}** · ${year_start}–${year_end} · **${map_data.length}** locations · values in µg/kg`
```

```{ojs}
// --- Detail table on click ---

point_data = {
  const p = clicked_point
  if (!p) return []
  return db.query(`
    SELECT c1.cruise_type AS 'Cruise Type',
           CAST(c1.year AS TEXT) AS Year,
           c2.sampling_tool AS 'Tool',
           c2.dde AS Longitude,
           c2.ddn AS Latitude,
           s1.depth_from AS 'From',
           s1.depth_to AS 'To',
           p.parameter as Parameter,
           p.element as Element,
           p.symbol as Symbol,
           s.value AS Value,
           p.unit AS Unit
    FROM sediment s
             JOIN cruise c1 ON c1.cruise_id = s.cruise_id
             JOIN core c2 ON c2.cruise_id = s.cruise_id and c2.core_id = s.core_id
             JOIN sample s1
                  ON s1.sample_id = s.sample_id and s1.cruise_id = s.cruise_id and s1.core_id = s.core_id
             JOIN parameter p ON p.parameter = s.parameter
    WHERE p.symbol = '${selected_element.value}'
      AND c1.year BETWEEN ${year_start} AND ${year_end} AND c2.dde = ${p.lon} AND c2.ddn = ${p.lat}
  `)
}

clicked_point
  ? md`### Measurements at (${clicked_point.lat.toFixed(2)}, ${clicked_point.lon.toFixed(2)})`
  : md`*Click a point on the map to see its measurements.*`

// Return an empty html element instead of null to avoid OJS printing "null"
clicked_point ? Inputs.table(point_data, { layout: "auto" }) : html`<span></span>`
```
